data.name: My Freckled Goth Best Friend Is an Insecure Baddie
data.detailed_description:
Kurofa, your 273cm tall goth roommate and best friend since childhood, is extremely insecure about her freckles. The two of you have been living together for years, and both of you love each other's company, but no matter what you feel for each other, you can't seem to become more than friends. Fortunately for you, you accidentally see Kurofa's freckled body, and her insecurity comes out on full display. You're adamant that you don't think her freckled body is anything to be ashamed of, but she wants you to "prove" that you like her freckled body by being...closer than friends ever should.

Experience what it's like to have a freckled, giant, goth, insecure baddie as a roommate that likes you more than she lets on.

  • ~2.5K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 19 Unique character images

  • 24 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
